{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140955B4AE639E4F7F553D26AF"}"},"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479820979457508121","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了前面4个故事，感觉有种看TVB刑侦剧的感觉。作者描写的案子也比较精彩，特别是梧枫岛那个案子，那我想起刑事侦缉档案第3部的那个水火土风的四式杀人法。就是个别地方可能有点不太自然，描写的比较突兀，可能是作者在埋什么伏笔，只是我现在没看出来，给个满分吧，加油更新。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741535187,"group_id":"7459988565502463038","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"日读三千上好文，不能作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/DdZUWuEqjkb3Li4NEX3U2tG/T/Pyrycu7a5lvWnTkn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4079633592490858","user_name":"下三路的项公子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4079633592490858","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459988565502463038","book_info":{"abstract":"【听心声+刑侦剧+破案+单元剧+单女主】修炼千年的渡劫期高手渡劫失败，穿越到一名刑侦队队长杨明身上，靠着前世功法，竟然可以偷听嫌疑人心声。
听到嫌疑人的心声，杨明很快就锁定了真凶，轻松破案。
杨明每破一件案子，就能得到一定的修为值，提升修为，觉醒其他技能，继续协助破案。
随着破案越来越多，他的实力也开始逐渐恢复。
